prompt: A realistic scene showing a single ornate lock with an extremely intricate metal key fully inserted into it, fitting perfectly. Surrounding it are several simple padlocks where different simple keys are inserted but do not match the ornate lock. The contrast between the perfect fit of the complex key and the mismatch of other keys must be visually clear. Natural lighting, shallow depth of field, highly realistic textures, clean composition, no text, no symbols.
metaphor: A complex key fits one ornate lock perfectly while other keys fail, showing a solution tailored to one case that does not generalize.
